steps.detail: Captured default dark theme state (html.className = 'dark'). UI shows dark background with light text, light-colored cards with borders.
Located Dark button in left sidebar and clicked to toggle theme. Button label changed from 'Dark' to 'Light', indicating theme switch occurred.
Verified theme class changed from 'dark' to 'light' on html element via JavaScript evaluation
Captured light theme state showing full visual transformation. UI shows light background with dark text, subtle card borders, maintained layout structure.
Resized browser to 768x1024 viewport size (tablet/iPad orientation)
Captured responsive tablet layout at 768x1024. Layout shows proper content reflow, sidebar remains visible, dashboard cards stack appropriately, all content readable and accessible.
Resized browser back to 1280x720 default desktop viewport
Confirmed final state: light theme still active (html.className = 'light'), viewport 1280x720 restored

assertions.name: Default theme screenshot captured successfully
assertions.actual: theme-responsive-default.jpeg (79.3 KB) shows dark theme with #1f2937 background

assertions.name: Theme toggle changes html class attribute
Alternative theme screenshot captures visual change
assertions.actual: theme-responsive-alt-theme.jpeg (81.8 KB) shows light theme with #ffffff background

assertions.name: Layout is responsive at tablet size
assertions.actual: theme-responsive-tablet.jpeg (61.6 KB) shows proper reflow, no horizontal scrolling

assertions.name: Desktop layout restored after resize
assertions.actual: viewport returned to desktop arrangement, light theme persisted

theme_detection.toggle_element: button with aria-label or text containing theme indicator

test_summary: ✅ PASS - All theme and responsive design tests executed successfully
